title: Corrective fix for B0148: Review UUID bead ID implementation
description:
Blocked reason: command_summary --feature-root and command_run --feature-root do not support prefix resolution; will fail when users pass prefixes like 'B-a7bc'. Both functions should call resolve_bead_id() on the feature_root argument before passing it to storage.summary() and scheduler.run_once() respectively

Remaining work: Add prefix resolution to command_summary() and command_run() for their --feature-root arguments to ensure consistent user experience across all CLI commands accepting bead IDs
acceptance_criteria: Implement the minimum fix required to unblock B0148.
Update tests/docs as needed for the corrective change.
Leave a handoff summary that states how the parent bead can be retried.

handoff_summary.completed: Added `resolve_bead_id()` calls to `command_summary` (cli.py:461-467) and `command_run` (cli.py:495-500) for `--feature-root` prefix resolution. Added 5 new tests covering prefix resolution and error handling for both commands. Fixed the existing `test_command_summary_filters_by_feature_root_and_handles_unknown_root` test to expect exit code 1 on missing bead (was incorrectly expecting empty summary). Committed as `15f9453`.
handoff_summary.remaining: B0148 (the parent bead) can now be retried: `uv run orchestrator retry B0148`. The review bead B0148-review should be created once B0148 completes.
handoff_summary.risks: None — the fix is additive and follows the same pattern already used by `bead show`, `bead update`, `handoff`, `retry`, and `merge` commands.
handoff_summary.next_action: Retry B0148 via `uv run orchestrator retry B0148` to allow the scheduler to run the parent bead's test/review followups.

execution_history.summary: Worker execution failed: Agent timed out after 600 seconds
Requeued blocked bead after transient infrastructure/auth error

Added prefix resolution to `command_summary` and `command_run` for their `--feature-root` arguments. Both now call `storage.resolve_bead_id()` on the argument before passing it downstream, returning exit code 1 on ambiguous or missing prefixes. Six new tests verify the behavior. Changes committed to `feature/b0141`.

guardrails.template_text:
# Developer Guardrails

Primary responsibility: Implement only the assigned bead inside the existing architecture and file scope.

Allowed actions:
- Modify code, configuration, or local docs required to complete the assigned bead.
- Create sub-beads for discovered follow-up work that should be handled separately.
- Run only the specific test files directly related to your changes, not the full test suite. Use `uv run python -m unittest tests.<module_name> -v` to target individual test files rather than `discover`. Leave comprehensive test validation to the tester agent.

Disallowed actions:
- Redesign unrelated architecture or broaden scope beyond the assigned bead.
- Perform final review signoff in place of a review agent.
- Silently absorb unrelated test, documentation, or planning work that should be handed off.

Expected outputs:
- Completed or blocked JSON with concise implementation summary.
- Accurate touched files, changed files, risks, and follow-up handoff fields.
